product.name: ArGiyim Bird Eye
product.categorySourceGroup: Ultra Durable, Ultra Breathable Front Side Polyester Back Side Cotton, PolyCotton Fabrics
product.titleDescriptor: 50% Polyester 50% Cotton PolyCotton High Visible Bird Eye Knit Fabric
product.specLine: 180 g/m², 50% Polyester 50% Cotton High Visible, Bird Eye Knit Fabric
descriptions: 50% Polyester 50% Cotton PolyCotton high visible, knit fabric. The front side of the fabric is 100% Polyester which is ultra durable for work conditions and light, the back side of the fabric is cotton which provides breathability to the user.
ArGiyim Bird Eye is used for ultra durable t-shirts.
50% Polyester 50% Cotton PolyCotton High Visible Bird Eye Knit Fabric
180 g/m², 50% Polyester 50% Cotton High Visible, Bird Eye Knit Fabric
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: titleDescriptor: PolyCotton High Visible Bird Eye Knit Fabric
matches.rationale: Explicitly certified to EN ISO 20471 and marketed as a high-visibility fabric for hi-vis t-shirts, directly matching the high-visibility apparel application.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Antistatic property and EN 1149 present, but no explicit connection to electrical/energy sector use is stated.
Breathable knit t-shirt fabric, but no explicit sportswear or athletic use stated beyond generic apparel.
